channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: White Sox outfielder Andrew Benintendi out 4 to 6 weeks with broken hand after being hit by pitch
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Chicago White Sox left fielder Andrew Benintendi will miss four to six weeks with a broken hand after being hit by a pitch in a spring training game on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Abdul Carter, potential No 1 overall pick in upcoming NFL Draft, has stress reaction in right foot: reports
item.description: Penn State star defender and potential No. 1 overall pick in the upcoming NFL Draft, Abdul Carter, was revealed to have a stress reaction in his right foot.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A Florida Gator took on a Florida gator. Billy Horschel prevailed in the matchup at PGA National
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — A Gator took on a gator. Billy Horschel won. Let's explain: Horschel played his college golf for the Florida Gators, so he knows plenty about the wildlife that gets seen on courses in the Sunshine State — including, yes, alligators.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Japanese artist Murakami lends artwork to exclusive MLB collaboration ahead of Tokyo Series
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Takashi Murakami’s artwork has graced luxury goods from top fashion houses and album covers of superstar musicians. Now the famed contemporary Japanese artist has teamed with Major League Baseball for an exclusive merchandise collaboration to celebrate next month’s Tokyo Series.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2025 NFL Draft Big Board: Top 50 Prospects
item.description: Looking forward to the 2025 NFL Draft? Here’s a breakdown of the top 50 draft-eligible players ahead of the Scouting Combine
item.dc:creator: Eddie Brown, The Mercury News

item.title: Verstappen and Norris 'respect' each other while joking about their F1 rivalry
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Max Verstappen and Lando Norris dismissed suggestions their Formula 1 rivalry has become a personal feud, going so far as to joke on Thursday that they’d been reduced to brawling in a pub.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Defensive end Abdul Carter says he's the best player in NFL 2025 draft class
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Former Penn State star Abdul Carter made one thing clear Wednesday: He should be the No. 1 overall pick in this year's NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Patriots running back recalls Bill Belichick putting him in 'fat camp' after he was drafted
item.description: Ex-New England Patriots running back Stevan Ridley recalled the moment Bill Belichick put him in "fat camp" after he was drafted in 2011.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro surfer Makai McNamara placed in medically induced coma following terrifying wipeout
item.description: Makai McNamara did regain consciousness after he was hit by a huge wave at Banzai Pipeline. He was then transported to the hospital where he was put into a coma for 72 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL reviewing possible changes to overtime rules. First downs to be measured electronically
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The NFL is considering changing overtime rules in the regular season to decrease the advantage for teams that win the coin toss. “It’s time to rethink the overtime rule,” league executive Troy Vincent said Wednesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool increases lead atop Premier League as Arsenal drops more points
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — It feels like a matter of when, not if, Liverpool seals a record-equaling 20th English league title. The gap at the top of the Premier League was extended to 13 points on Wednesday after a 2-0 victory over Newcastle.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Utah, drop 4th straight as rough February nears end
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — There are at least two good things about the month of February for the Blackhawks: That it's almost over and that they didn't play for half of it. Because when they've been on the ice, it hasn't been a good month.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts high-stakes CONCACAF Champions Cup match up with CS Herediano
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns home for a decisive CONCACAF Champions Cup showdown against CS Herediano on Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Poles, Johnson detail 'clear vision' for Bears heading into NFL Scouting Combine
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to upgrade their offensive line and add a pass rusher in the upcoming NFL Scouting Combine, while also evaluating their running back and tight end positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
